note: V13 SbPoW hardening pass. Height-gated at V13_HEIGHT (12000) the SbPoW signed preimage upgrades from V11 layout (7 fields, 129 B) to V13 layout (11 fields, 205 B). New committed fields: timestamp (closes timestamp re-stamp), bits_q (closes difficulty fork), merkle_root (closes tx-set mutation), genesis_hash (closes cross-chain replay). (A) include/sost/sbpow.h: new SBPOW_DOMAIN_TAG_V13 (SOST/POW-SIG/v13), build_sbpow_message_v13() declaration, ValidationInputs extended with v13_height + timestamp + bits_q + merkle_root + genesis_hash. (B) src/sbpow.cpp: build_sbpow_message_v13() implementation; validate_sbpow_for_block branches on (in.height >= in.v13_height) to use v13 preimage; v11 path preserved for backwards-reproducibility of pre-V13 blocks. (C) include/sost/block_validation.h + src/block_validation.cpp: ValidateSbPoW wrapper signature extended (timestamp, bits_q, merkle_root, genesis_hash, v13_height). (D) src/sost-node.cpp: accept-block site passes ts64/bits_q/mrkl32/g_genesis_hash/V13_HEIGHT; handle_getinfo exposes new genesis_hash JSON field. (E) src/sost-miner.cpp: lazy genesis_hash fetch from RPC getinfo with cache + abort if unavailable; both threaded and single-thread signing sites branch on h >= V13_HEIGHT. (F) tests/test_sbpow_v13_hardening.cpp NEW: 12 test functions / 36 assertions / 36 PASS covering happy path, timestamp / bits_q / merkle_root / genesis_hash binding, cross-chain replay, pre-V13 backwards compat, boundary at v13_height, coinbase mismatch under v13, all-fields-committed sweep, output size + determinism. (G) tests/test_sbpow_submit_integration.cpp: 9 call sites migrated to new wrapper signature. (H) docs/V13_SBPOW_HARDENING.md NEW: full design + migration + risk register. Pre-existing C++ failures (bond-lock, popc, escrow, dynamic-rewards) unrelated to SbPoW. Memory-Lock REJECTED and not reopened. No header_version bump (V13 reuses v2). ZERO consensus change for blocks at height < 12000.
